title: P0: cbor_put_tstr incorrect header for strings >65535
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_status.c:102-122 - len > UINT16_MAX uses 0x79 (u16) with only 2 length bytes and wrong header_len=3; leads to invalid CBOR and potential memcpy overrun. Incremental check or proper 0x7a for u32 length needed. codereview
